# init(amount:currencyCode:)

**Initializer**

Initializes a balance amount with a monetary amount.

## Declaration

```swift
init(amount: NSDecimalNumber, currencyCode: String)
```

## Parameters

- **amount**: The monetary amount to assign to the balance.
- **currencyCode**: The ISO 4217 currency code that applies to the monetary amount.

## Return Value

An initialized [doc://com.apple.sirikit/documentation/Intents/INBalanceAmount] object.

## Discussion

Use this method to initialize balance amounts involving currencies. The [doc://com.apple.sirikit/documentation/Intents/INBalanceAmount/balanceType] property is automatically set to [doc://com.apple.sirikit/documentation/Intents/INBalanceType/money].

## Initializing a Balance Amount Object

- **init(amount:balanceType:)**: Initializes a balance amount object with a customizable type of information.
